2198300.name: Red Light White Light
2198300.description:
Overthrown Interactive presents our debut demo —

Welcome to Red Light White Light, a terrifying new horror experience where survival depends on your ability to move at the right time — and stay perfectly still when death is watching.

In this single-player (for now) nightmare, you’ll face off against an unforgiving entity that hunts those who defy the rules. When the light turns white, you run. When the light turns red… you freeze. Hold your focus where it matters — on survival.

Will you keep your nerve, or will fear claim your final breath?

Features:

  • Classic gameplay with a horror twist: Red Light Green Light reinvented as a survival horror experience.

  • Randomized light intervals: No predictable patterns — stay sharp, or it’s over.

  • Immersive horror audio: Every footstep, scream, and deathblow designed for maximum dread.

Can you survive Red Light White Light?
The demo is available now with updates to come. Play and Wishlist now.
